description: Plugin-distributed hooks for networking-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 2 mechanically-detectable networking-hygiene smells — (1) a trunk config with 'allowed vlan all' (L2 blast-radius sprawl), (2) a change/runbook file that applies config but names no rollback path. Set NETENG_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
